passives.name: Field Synthesis
passives.description: After each quest Hildegard crafts 1 random consumable item from her medicinal pool. Item is added to an empty item slot if one is available.

skills.name: Smite
skills.description: Deal dice + CHA damage to a single enemy.

skills.name: Cleanse
skills.description: Remove CHA modifier debuff stacks (oldest first) from the ceil(dice_result / 2) lowest-HP allies.

skills.name: Heal
skills.description: Restore dice + CHA HP to the ally with the lowest current HP (including Hildegard).

learnable_skills.name: Regeneration
learnable_skills.description: Apply regeneration to the lowest-HP ally (including Hildegard). Heal (dice + CHA) HP at the start of that ally's next 3 turns.

learnable_skills.name: Holy Smite
learnable_skills.description: Deal dice + CHA + (active buff count across all allies x CHA modifier) damage to a single enemy.

learnable_skills.name: Blessing
learnable_skills.description: Apply Upgrade to a single ally for 1 turn. Their dice gain 1 tier this turn.

learnable_skills.name: Battle Hymn
learnable_skills.description: All allies gain Advantage on their dice rolls next turn.

learnable_skills.name: Fortify
learnable_skills.description: Grant a single ally block equal to dice + CON. On the first hit while block is active, deal CON modifier damage back to the attacker.
